headline: Sovereign Demand for Minerals Should Keep Lifting This Metals and Mining ETF
summary: Governments around the world are treating metals and minerals as strategic assets, and that shift is creating a structural demand floor that did not exist a decade ago. iShares MSCI Global Metals & Mining Producers ETF (NYSEARCA:PICK) offers diversified exposure to companies that extract metals from the ground, without layering in gold, silver, or uranium. ... Sovereign Demand for Minerals Should Keep Lifting This Metals and Mining ETF

headline: Jim Cramer on Freeport-McMoRan: “I Don’t Want to Be There”
summary: Jim Cramer gave top insight on Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE:FCX), sharing a game plan of what to buy, sell, and hold right now. A club member requested an outlook on copper prices, specifically asking about FCX. Cramer replied: I have to tell you, I think that copper is peaking. They also have a gold business, too, […]

headline: Shares of base metal-related stocks are trading higher amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which damaged production facilities and disrupted supplies. Declining output in key Chilean mines may raise investor concerns about broader supply constraints.

headline: Shares of precious metal-related stocks are trading higher amid ongoing uncertainty related to the Middle East conflict. Fed Chair Powell said that there is no need to raise interest rates in response to rising oil prices.

headline: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.
